title: Swooooooords
body:
Makes swords ridiculously (~150 blocks) long. That's it, that's the whole pack.

Compatible with most resource packs, including HD ones.

Not mod-compatible, but should be easy to add. Open an issue on the GitHub if you want compatibility with a mod.

# Sample Image

![A minecraft player holding a very, very long sword, in a void world on a stone platform.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5ee938fb9ea344e091aaf7e5e86ec564d507534.png)
![The same image as above, but with an HD resource pack enabled.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edc38dfd5bef981cc9ae35ae66d9f4dd40d3c49d_0.webp)
